footer.bio: AI trainer and builder. I create AI automation solutions for businesses and teach entrepreneurs how to turn AI into a business model.
footer.description: AI trainer and builder. Creating AI automation solutions for businesses and teaching entrepreneurs how to turn AI into a business model.

hero.subtitle: Turkey's largest independent AI ecosystem, turning artificial intelligence into real results — from individuals to enterprises.
hero.stat1Desc: Turkey's most followed independent AI content creator.
hero.stat2Desc: A community of entrepreneurs earning with AI.
hero.stat3Desc: Custom AI automation for companies and global brand partnerships.

products.sectionDesc: We provide AI solutions at every scale — from solo entrepreneurs to enterprise holdings.
products.card1Desc: Ready-to-use AI solution packages, training and automation tools for SMEs and business owners.
products.card2Desc: Tailored AI automation and consulting services for holdings and large-scale operations.
products.card3Headline: Turn Your Idea into a Business
products.card3Desc: Community, mentoring and resources for individual entrepreneurs looking to turn AI into a business model.
products.card4Desc: Reach wide audiences with professional content creation and influencer collaborations.

solutions.artifexDesc: Ready-to-deploy AI solution packages that transform your business. Result-oriented B2B AI automations that save staff costs and reduce operational burden to zero.

collaborations.heroSubtitle: AI-focused content creator and tech educator. Reach millions with innovative, high-viral-potential content for your brand.
collaborations.featuredWorksDesc: Some of our projects with the world's leading AI brands that have reached millions of views.
collaborations.platformReachDesc: Reach hundreds of thousands of followers passionate about AI and technology simultaneously across 6 platforms.
collaborations.ctaDesc: To reach the right audience with our AI and technology-focused content, explore our

about.sectionTitleHighlight: The team that makes an impact
about.sectionDesc: We work with a hybrid team that combines human talent with the power of artificial intelligence.

services.sectionDesc: Not just standard packages — we build tailored AI infrastructure together for enterprises and high-volume operations.
services.step1Desc: We listen to your current workflows together and identify bottlenecks that can be optimized with AI.
services.step2Desc: We map out the most suitable AI tools and automation scenarios for your needs together.
services.step3Desc: We set up systems, make API connections and test together.
services.step4Desc: We teach your team how to use the system and deliver it turnkey.
services.ctaDesc: Contact us directly for our services, consulting requests or brand collaborations.

aiFactory.title: Learn to Earn Revenue by Selling
aiFactory.desc: A premium community offering ready-to-use automation systems for individual entrepreneurs and freelancers. Build your own business and take your place in the AI revolution.

corporateTrainings.sectionDesc: We provided AI training and consulting services to Turkey's leading institutions and organizations.
corporateTrainings.ctaTitle: Let's Plan Custom Training for Your Organization
corporateTrainings.ctaDesc: Contact us for AI training, workshop and consulting requests.
corporateTrainings.client1Desc: A 2-day AI tools workshop was held.
corporateTrainings.client2Desc: A 6-hour online training series (5 sessions, 120 participants) was held. One-on-one consulting was conducted with staff.
corporateTrainings.client4Desc: A best-selling AI course reaching 45,000+ students was published.
corporateTrainings.client5Desc: AI and automation training was delivered.
corporateTrainings.client6Desc: AI tools and productivity training was organized.
